title: One-binary S2: universal macOS dist artifact (lipo arm64+amd64) + SHA256 checksums.txt manifest; release-verify requires both; release notes gain a Fingerprints section
summary: OPERATOR-BOOSTED to second-block priority 2026-07-13. APPROVED PLAN slice 2/5 (dep S1). go/Makefile: add bin/dist/evolve-darwin-universal target — build both darwin arches (existing rule pattern go/Makefile:58-63, CGO_ENABLED=0 -trimpath) then lipo -create -output; extend the dist target (:51) to also emit checksums.txt (shasum -a 256 of every dist artifact). .goreleaser.yml (:27-31 build id evolve): add the native universal_binaries block so tagged releases publish evolve-darwin-universal + checksums. Extend release-verify-binaries (go/cmd/evolve/cmd_release_verify_binaries.go) to REQUIRE the universal artifact + checksums.txt on the GH release (hard fail if absent). Release-notes/changelog template gains a Fingerprints section (copy-paste SHA256 per artifact for corporate approval requests). Purpose: ONE macOS fingerprint per version instead of two; approval requests become self-service.
acceptance: make -C go dist produces bin/dist/evolve-darwin-universal; lipo -archs shows x86_64 arm64
checksums.txt present and matches shasum -a 256 for every dist artifact
release-verify-binaries FAILS when universal artifact or checksums.txt missing (RED test)
